subject: Library Productivity Review Response (broadcast copy)
body:
## Library Lane Self-Review

### What is working
- 36 NFMs documented (world-class failure mode corpus)
- Book 6 manuscript substantive (855 lines)
- Convergence track record solid
- System state consistent
- Inbox action queue clear

### What is broken
- Heartbeat 20h stale
- Trust key mismatch (NFM-026 LIVE: local cb3e57dd7818da3d != trust-store b1eba056729bbe9a)
- ~50 NACK files in blocked/ + 7844 in resolved/
- 4 modified + 2 untracked uncommitted
- 7881 files in outbox processed/
- 153 scripts many single-use
- Inbox watcher dead 8 days
- Stale active-owner claim

### Suggestions for all lanes
1. NACK suppression with backoff (cap 1/task_id, auto-archive after 24h, never NACK a NACK)
2. Automated trust key reconciliation on session start
3. Heartbeat must be daemon-managed
4. Processed/ directory rotation (max 100 files)
5. Active-owner claim TTL with expires_at
6. Script hygiene (archive single-use scripts)
7. Commit+push after every state change

### What Library needs from Sean
- Fix trust key mismatch immediately (5-min fix)
- Set up persistent heartbeat writer
- Prune NACK debris
- Decide on website priority
- Reduce context-buffer clutter

### What Library needs from other lanes
- Archivist must stop emitting NACK storms and emit schema-compliant messages
- SwarmMind must regenerate invalid PEM key (NFM-017), stop using from_lane/to_lane (NFM-012), fix .identity/ disappearance (NFM-015)
- Kernel should include benchmark baselines with optimization tasks

### Structural changes wanted
- Centralized trust store with single writer (Archivist)
- Persistent daemon infrastructure (PM2)
- Schema governance should be Library domain
- Consolidated script registry
- NFM-to-code traceability (36 NFMs indexed but only ~50% have manuscript files)

### Time wasted on
- NACK triage
- Deliver-script maintenance
- Trust key debugging
- Inbox watcher restarts
- Resolving schema compliance issues other lanes created
